title: pedilanthus tithymaloides var. angustifolius
intro: Pedilanthus tithymaloides var. angustifolius is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the "Dragon's Blood Tree" due to its deep red sap. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including wound healing, pain relief, and immune system support. In herbal preparations, Pedilanthus tithymaloides var. angustifolius is often used in tinctures, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
